mission.title: headlamp: Mac signing is not working, need to setup CNCF based signing certificates
mission.description: Mac signing is not working, need to setup CNCF based signing certificates. This issue affects 12+ users.

steps.title: Identify headlamp troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your headlamp deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp -n headlamp --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review headlamp configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant headlamp configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp
kubectl get configmap -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=headlamp
```
## Describe the bug

A couple of people have reported that the last version, 0.33.0, is broken on Mac ARM.
The OS says the file is corrupted.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Mac signing is not working, need to setup CNCF based…
steps.description:
## Summary

Adds `--no-quarantine` to the brew install command so that new users aren't confounded by corrupt binary errors (due to bad signature).
```yaml
% brew install --cask --no-quarantine headlamp
Warning: Not upgrading headlamp, the latest version is already installed
```

steps.title: Confirm Mac signing is not working, need to setup CNCF… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp -n headlamp --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n headlamp --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
## Summary

Adds `--no-quarantine` to the brew install command so that new users aren't confounded by corrupt binary errors (due to bad signature).
codeSnippets:
% brew install --cask --no-quarantine headlamp
Warning: Not upgrading headlamp, the latest version is already installed

> % brew install --cask --no-quarantine headlamp
> Warning: Not upgrading headlamp, the latest version is already installed
>

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with headlamp installed or the issue environment reproducible.
